data.biography: Orion Lee (born July 10, 1980) is a Hong Kong-born Chinese Australian theatre and film actor. On screen, he is known for playing the lead role of King-Lu in First Cow (2019) and voicing Jin Lee (Mei's father) in Turning Red (2022). Lee has also played smaller parts in notable films such as Skyfall (2012), Fury (2014), Justice League (2017), and The Last Jedi (2017).
data.name: Orion Lee
